title: Restituted Orbit
description: Orbit determination using delayed telemetry data with a one-day latency, computed from a three-day moving window and typically sampled every 60 seconds with lower precision than precise orbits.

definitions.definition: Orbit determination using delayed telemetry data with a one-day latency, computed from a three-day moving window and typically sampled every 60 seconds with lower precision than precise orbits.
